title: Image Request Thread
wikitext:
[]: Geofront planes and design             Quote Post by Nephilim » Thu Jul 01, 2004 8:17 pm Hi guys, this is a very trivial and stupid question/request I was searching for "nerv" images in google, and i found this image: The links was broken, so i couldn't get the full picture. Is this a fan work, or is it an official plane of the geofront? Does anybody have a bigger picture?

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Thu Jul 01, 2004 9:09 pm Probably a fan work. It doesn't look very accurate considering the black moon was almost completely filled and the geofront was just the very top part of it.

[]: Please help me find a picture             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Jul 05, 2004 11:53 pm Does anyone know where I can find a good quality picture of Rei in EoE where she is floating in lcl and her hair is pointing straight up?

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Loves Toji » Mon Jul 05, 2004 11:58 pm best i can say is take a screen shot

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Tue Jul 06, 2004 12:04 am Do you mean this one?: http://www.gratisweb.com/posttenebraslux/ReiLCL.jpg Or maybe is the otherone showing her from the front, i don't have that one in good quality.

[]:             Quote Post by TheMessiah » Tue Jul 06, 2004 12:19 am great, now im trying to look and see if i can make out what langauge the writing is :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Tue Jul 06, 2004 12:32 am Yeah that one, but I need one with her face. A screenshot is a good idea, I almost forgot I had this shiny new dvd drive.

[]:             Quote Post by Abaddon » Sun Jul 11, 2004 11:09 pm It's kind hard to tell. If you could give us the website address, some body here could possibly aid you. The diagram does look kind of accurate, but the position of Central Dogma seems to lie outside the sphere.

[]:             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 11:11 pm Its pretty good fan art :shock: :shock: I want this guy to build me my own geo front , lol

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sun Jul 11, 2004 11:11 pm Definitly a fanwork, the roundness of the egg dosn't match up to terminal dogma

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 12, 2004 12:23 am I don't know, I've never seen it before.

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Sat Jul 31, 2004 2:07 am Looking arroun in the net, i finally could find the official designs of the geofront, it doesn't have the planes of the nerv headquarters, but it's very nice !!! :shock: Here is the Big image: [url]http://www.avians.net/rkc/14daughters/scans/newtype100pc_geofront-dimensional.jpg[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Sat Jul 31, 2004 2:25 am You see that little tiny sliver of empty space at the top of that circle? That's the geofront. The first picture in this thread was not accurate at all.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sat Jul 31, 2004 10:11 am Holy hell.... that is one big cavren.... Even when I saw the black Egg I never imagined that it was THAT big...

[]:             Quote Post by Abaddon » Sat Jul 31, 2004 11:58 pm Indeed, that does look accurate in contrast to the first picture. I knew that only part of the Geofront was exposed, but I didn't realize the entire sphere was that large :shock: Excellent find!

[]: Misato's tears and kaworu's size             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Aug 03, 2004 11:24 am This may be a stupid question but in episode when Misato receives Kaji's last message and she cries it appears her tears have red and green colors? And another thing. In the end of episode 6 when Shinji going to see if Rei is alive we see that the size of a human is minimum in front of the Eva's hand.In episode 24 when Eva-01 grabs Kaworu,he is in the size of its hand!!(unfortunately i cannot find the screenshots)I mean when did he grow?? :shock: Or maybe all of these are in my imagination?

[]:             Quote Post by Nephilim » Tue Aug 03, 2004 12:19 pm Misato's tears: They seem to have a green and red colors, but i think that this is because of the table's shadow, because the tears seem transparent. Kaworu & Eva-01's hand (ep 24): Here kaworu is too big for the hand Entry plug & Eva-01's hand (ep 6): Here the size of Shinji is way too small for the entry plug and the hand Entry plug & Eva-01's hand (ep 18.): Here the size of the entry plug is smaller compared to episode 6.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Aug 03, 2004 12:52 pm look Kaworu!!!How did he grow??And nice screenshots Nephilim.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Tue Aug 03, 2004 1:52 pm I read somewhere that the artists sometimes changed the relative size of the Evas depending on the scene. Like when Eva-01 is killing Sachiel, it's bigger than some of the biggest skycrapers. But when they are fighting Leliel they Evas are just big enough to climb up the same skyscrapers to safe themselves from the Sea or Durac.

[]:             Quote Post by kosure » Tue Aug 03, 2004 2:10 pm Im not saying that this was premeditated, (Cain Luppus' explinatinos seems fine for me) but Kaworu was and angel. I wouldn't put it past him to be able to change is size a bit.
summary:
[]: Geofront planes and design             Quote Post by Nephilim » Thu Jul 01, 2004 8:17 pm Hi guys, this is a very trivial and stupid question/request I was searching for "nerv" images in google, and i found this image: The links was broken, so i couldn't get the full picture. Is this a fan work, or is it an official plane of the geofront? Does anybody have a bigger picture?

[]:         &n
